hero.heading: Where Every Bite is Bliss
hero.subheading: Mediterranean and Armenian cuisine crafted with passion — 97 five-star reviews on Glendale Ave. Fresh ingredients, bold flavors, and a warm dining experience.

about.heading: A Taste of the Mediterranean
paragraphs: Bliss Restaurant brings the vibrant flavors of the Mediterranean and Armenia to South Glendale Ave. Every dish is prepared with fresh, quality ingredients and the kind of culinary care that turns a meal into an experience.

With 97 reviews and a 4.6-star rating, we've become a neighborhood favorite for lunch and dinner. From perfectly grilled kebabs to fresh salads and house-made dips, our menu celebrates the best of Mediterranean cuisine.
Open Tuesday through Sunday, 10 AM to 7 PM. Closed Mondays. Dine in, take out, or call ahead.

services.title: Grilled Kebabs
services.description: Premium lamb, chicken, beef, and koobideh kebabs — marinated in-house and grilled over open flame.

services.title: Fresh Meze & Salads
services.description: Hummus, baba ganoush, tabbouleh, fattoush, and seasonal salads made fresh daily.

services.title: Family Platters
services.description: Generous combo platters and family-style servings perfect for sharing. Feed the table without breaking the bank.

services.title: Wraps & Sandwiches
services.description: Shawarma wraps, falafel pitas, and loaded sandwiches for a quick, flavorful lunch on the go.

reviews.name: Anna K.
reviews.text: Best kebabs in Glendale. The chicken kebab is so juicy and flavorful. We eat here at least once a week.

reviews.name: Michael S.
reviews.text: Bliss is my go-to for Mediterranean food. Everything is fresh, portions are generous, and the staff is wonderful.

reviews.name: Diana M.
reviews.text: The hummus and baba ganoush are to die for. You can taste the quality in every bite. Love this place.

reviews.name: Robert H.
reviews.text: Great food at fair prices. The family platter is incredible value — enough to feed four people easily.

reviews.name: Liana G.
reviews.text: A hidden gem on Glendale Ave. Authentic flavors, warm atmosphere, and they treat you like family.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: Bliss Restaurant 1240 S Glendale Ave Glendale CA 91205
